organization.name: Shanky Group
organization.description: Shanky Group is a diversified business conglomerate with interests in metals, buildtech, financial services, and corporate training.

leadership_team.name: Vipin Kumar
leadership_team.image_alt: Vipin Kumar - Managing Director and Owner of Shanky Group
leadership_team.description: Mr. Vipin Kumar has been at helm of Shanky Group since its inception. A Chartered Accountant and MBA (Finance) with over a decade of experience in diversified businesses, he has been instrumental in Group's expansion and diversification.

leadership_team.name: Manoj Kumar Mishra
leadership_team.image_alt: Manoj Kumar Mishra - Executive Director of Shanky Group
leadership_team.description: Mr. Mishra brings over 22 years of experience in finance, accounts, and commercial operations across manufacturing and retail sectors.

leadership_team.name: Poonam Shah
leadership_team.description: Ms. Shah oversees operational excellence and process optimization across Group's diverse businesses.

leadership_team.name: Priyanka Girdhar
leadership_team.description: Ms. Girdhar is an accomplished administrative leader with a strong track record of designs, directs, and optimizes an organisation's administrative backbone.

leadership_team.name: Rajeev Ranjan Jha
leadership_team.education: Master's Degree in Finance and Chartered Accountant (Intermediate)
leadership_team.description: Financial operations leader responsible for accounting, financial reporting, and compliance functions.

leadership_team.name: Shivani Bansal
leadership_team.description: I am a legal advisor with experience in contract review, legal documentation, and dispute resolution.

leadership_team.name: Shubh Gupta
leadership_team.description: Key member of leadership team driving procurement, vendor management, and supply chain execution across Group.
